description: Increase Oni of Skulls figure size by 8% in the diorama view. Current scale: 1.30, target: 1.404 (1.30 * 1.08).
steps: In src/components/RegionDetailModal.tsx, find the FIGURE_SIZE_OVERRIDES constant (around line 20). Change `'sp-oni-of-skulls': 1.30` to `'sp-oni-of-skulls': 1.404`.
acceptance_criteria: Oni of Skulls figure in the region detail diorama renders at scale 1.404
findings: Straightforward change from 1.30 to 1.404 in FIGURE_SIZE_OVERRIDES.
